title: Added Things
description: Random added features like ores, tools, biomes, dimensions & more. Oh, and there is a Deepslate Instant Mining Enchantment.
body:
**WELCOME TO THE ADDED THINGS MOD!**
This mod includes _silly_ things my minds makes up to add to minecraft!
This includes life changing things like the... idk bucket?
It Includes stuff like new ores, tools, armor, enchantments, biomes and dimensions (and more)!

**IT COSTS _0.00_ WITH ADDITIONAL _0.00_ AND WE ARE DOING A _BUY_ ONE GET ONE _FREE_**

This has been tested, can't find that much bugs.

### Just a silly mod I made :) (There will be updates)


<details>
<summary>Content</summary>

```
- Oxidine Ore
- Oxidine Tools (Sword, pickaxe, axe, shovel)
- Raw Oxidine item
- The Dream Dimension
- Toxic Waste biome
- The Prism Block
- Scissors
- Imagination item
- Your mind item
- Idk bucket
- Sandwich Bread
- Hazelnut Sandwich
- Hazelnut Spread
- Chocolate
- Hazel
- Hazel Leaves Block
- Nut
- Hazelnut
- Oil Powder
- Bucket with Oil
- Raw Plastic
- Plastic
- Plastic Block
- Green Log
- Green Planks
- Greenlands biome
- Hylo Ore
- Hylo Fractures
- Melted Hylo Fractures
- Hylo Upgrade Kit
- Hylo Ingot
- Potion of Haste
- Potion of Haste II
- Potion of Haste (Extended)
- Instant Deepslate Enchantment
- Bottle of Stamina
- Hylo Toolset (Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel)
- Polished Hylo Ingot
- Hylo Block
- Hylo Bread
- Hylo Armor
```

</details>




The mod dosen't require hardware requirments, just added blocks, items, world generation, biome, dimension, all that stuff.

This is **one** mod, with no extra _dependencies_, _files_ or _mods_


<details>
<summary>Installation Guide</summary>

_If you are installing with the modrinth app or any other loader you don't need an installation guide but this is for people who use the minecraft launcher (or loaders that don't have modrinth API)_

To Install you simply drag the .jar file to your mods folder (probably in **C:/Users/(youruser)/Appdata/Roaming/.minecraft** make sure you have neoforge on the version 1.21.4 or 1.21.8 because it wont work on any other version.

</details>



### !! QUICK NOTE !!
Random thing, but if you run BSL Shaders (and probably others) it might not have biome colouring features which can mess up biome water colours in the toxic waste biome and greendlands biome.  

Anyways, thank you for even viewing this mod. It shows that you are atleast a little interested in what I do :)

_For Neoforge 1.21.8_
